generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline (-347) already indicates clear distrust in mainstream journalism, so the aligned petition-astroturf campaign reinforces rather than converts. The profile's high extraversion (84th percentile) and very high activity level (99th) mean this person is socially engaged and likely encounters peer-signaled petitions repeatedly; low trust (25.7th) and high neuroticism (77th) increase receptivity to threat and elite-doubt cues, while low compliance (18.2nd) and moderate deliberation (32.6th) reduce critical scrutiny of fabricated consensus. The T2 coordinated wave over weeks provides sustained social proof, moving the score downward by 100 points to -447 — a clear update but not maximal, as the prior is already strong.

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Trust In Mainstream Journalism
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts
